creator: shurd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Marcelo Araujo wrote:
> Hey Stephen,
>
> You need help to fix this Port? I can help you!
> Not is necessary to open a new PR for to update this Port, use the same
> PR for this.
>   

Nah, the makefile needed to be fixed.  It's fixed in CVS now, so the 
next working archive will be fixed up.  Should be done by this weekend.

I'll use the same PR then.
